summary: Iteration 30 - Funnel Builder Module (Fase 4) Testing Complete. All backend tests passed (16/16). Frontend UI verified working. Features tested: Landing Page Builder with 11 sections, Documenti Legali generator (3 HTML documents), partner prefill from MongoDB, /api/api/ double prefix bug fix verified.

issues: Console hydration warnings about <span> inside <tbody> - cosmetic issue, does not affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/partner-journey/funnel/{partner_id}/landing-page returns prefill data (PARTNER_NOME, PARTNER_NICCHIA) from partner profile
POST /api/partner-journey/funnel/{partner_id}/landing-page with genera_html:true generates complete HTML landing page
POST /api/partner-journey/funnel/{partner_id}/landing-page with genera_html:false saves draft without HTML generation
GET /api/partner-journey/funnel/{partner_id}/documenti-legali returns prefill data from partner profile
POST /api/partner-journey/funnel/{partner_id}/documenti-legali with genera:true generates 3 HTML documents (Cookie Policy, Privacy Policy, Condizioni di Vendita)
Frontend FunnelBuilder component correctly filters partners to show only F4+ (9 partners visible)
Landing Page tab shows 11 collapsible sections with progress bar and checklist
Documenti Legali tab shows 10 legal form fields with generate button
/api/api/ double prefix bug is FIXED - all API calls now use correct /api/ prefix
Router registered correctly at line 14396-14398 in server.py
seed_data_creation: Partner 2 (Arianna Aceto, F9) used for testing - landing page and documenti legali generated during tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Funnel Builder module fully functional. Partners in F4+ can access Landing Page Builder (11 sections) and Documenti Legali generator (3 HTML documents). Data is persisted to MongoDB under partner.landing_page and partner.documenti_legali. The /api/api/ double prefix bug was fixed in App.js getApiUrl() function.

landing_page_builder.GET_prefill: PASSED - Returns PARTNER_NOME, PARTNER_NICCHIA from partner profile
landing_page_builder.POST_save_draft: PASSED - Saves data without generating HTML, stato='bozza'
landing_page_builder.POST_generate_html: PASSED - Generates complete HTML landing page, stato='pronta'
landing_page_builder.persistence: PASSED - Data persisted to MongoDB and retrieved correctly

documenti_legali.GET_prefill: PASSED - Returns titolare_nome, email_legale from partner profile
documenti_legali.POST_save_without_generation: PASSED - Saves data without generating HTML
documenti_legali.POST_generate_documents: PASSED - Generates 3 HTML documents (Cookie Policy, Privacy Policy, Condizioni di Vendita)
documenti_legali.persistence: PASSED - Documents persisted to MongoDB and retrieved correctly

frontend_ui.funnel_builder_navigation: PASSED - Accessible via Strumenti > Funnel Builder
frontend_ui.partner_selector: PASSED - Shows 9 F4+ partners with search functionality
frontend_ui.landing_page_tab: PASSED - Shows 11 collapsible sections with progress bar (7/74 campi)
frontend_ui.documenti_legali_tab: PASSED - Shows 10 legal form fields with generate button
frontend_ui.action_buttons: PASSED - Save Draft, Generate, Preview, Copy HTML, Mark Published buttons present
frontend_ui.generated_documents_display: PASSED - Shows 3 document cards with Anteprima and Copia HTML buttons

mocked_apis.canva_api: MOCKED - Canva API token not configured
mocked_apis.kling_ai: MOCKED - Kling AI API key not configured
